project.name: Kreya
project.tagline: Tell Kreya what you need. Consider it done.
project.description: AI-powered, WhatsApp-first social media management SaaS. Users send WhatsApp messages (text, photo, video, voice note) → Claude generates caption + image → publishes to Instagram.
project.core_loop: WhatsApp input (text / photo / video / voice) → Claude caption → AI or user image → Instagram post

hosting.auto_deploy: GitHub push to main → Vercel auto-deploys
hosting.note: Old 'kreya' project (kreya-jet.vercel.app) is deprecated — do not use

storage.purpose: Host user-uploaded photos/videos for WhatsApp→Instagram flow

gpu_compute.ken_burns_worker: Python + FFmpeg on Modal, called via web endpoint

database_schema.pending_posts: id, whatsapp_phone, caption, caption_variants (jsonb, 3 alternates), image_url, user_image_url, image_source (user|ai), is_video, sibling_id, media_items (jsonb array of {url,is_video} for carousels), state (pending_approval|in_edit|scheduled|published|discarded|collecting_carousel), scheduled_for, ig_post_id, ig_post_url, published_at, post_mortem_sent_at, created_at
database_schema.instagram_accounts: id, account_name, instagram_user_id, access_token, token_expires_at, is_active
database_schema.user_profiles: id, whatsapp_phone, brand_name, niche, tone, profile_context, learned_style (Haiku-summarized voice from past IG captions), onboarding_step (1-4), created_at

whatsapp_flow.onboarding: 3-question brand setup (name → niche → tone) stored in user_profiles, gates all messages until step=4

edit_flow.text_in_edit: handleEditRefinement — caption update, image regeneration, or revert to user photo
edit_flow.media_in_edit: handleEditWithNewMedia — replaces image/video, keeps existing caption

whatsapp_flow.voice: Groq Whisper transcription → used as prompt for caption + AI image generation
whatsapp_flow.scheduling: Natural language parsed by Claude Haiku → stored as scheduled_for TIMESTAMPTZ

env_vars_required: MODAL_KEN_BURNS_URL (optional; if set, Ken Burns Ken Burns reel rendering via Modal GPU; fallback to simple render-reel if not set)

known_limitations.scheduling: publish-scheduled cron removed (Vercel Hobby plan — every-5min not allowed). Scheduled posts won't auto-publish until Pro plan or alternative cron (e.g. Supabase pg_cron + pg_net).
known_limitations.music_collaborators: Not available via Instagram Graph API — app-only features

completed_this_session: Strategy doc: docs/strategy-chat-first-social-os.md (chat-first social OS vision + phase 1 plan)
Caption variants v1 — generateCaptionVariants returns 3 angles (hook/story/CTA) in one Sonnet 4.6 call. Stored in pending_posts.caption_variants jsonb. User replies bare 1/2/3 to swap active caption.

Style memory v0 — lib/style-memory.ts pulls last 50 IG captions via Graph API, summarizes voice via Haiku into user_profiles.learned_style. Triggered fire-and-forget after OAuth callback; refresh on demand via WA command 'learn my style'. getProfileContextForPhone concatenates brand profile + learned style for every caption call.

Onboarding & Stripe billing integration — (1) NextStepsChecklist component tracks WhatsApp/Instagram/engagement completion; integrated into /account dashboard. (2) Dynamic pricing on homepage fetches from Stripe API with 1-hour cache. (3) Overflow notifications added to edit refinement and carousel generation flows; story flow already had them. (4) All feature gating verified: train-lora endpoint enforces Pro plan, buildBrandedImage routes Pro→Replicate vs free→Pollinations, daily limit enforced with reset at midnight. Stripe webhook (checkout.session.completed, customer.subscription.updated, customer.subscription.deleted) already implemented and working.

Hybrid Video Rendering (PR #42, branch: claude/integrate-ffmpeg-api-VqvEH) — (1) Modal Ken Burns GPU: Python FFmpeg worker on Modal L40S GPU for smooth image zoom. app/api/video/render-ken-burns calls web endpoint, returns base64 video. Cost ~$0.0005/5s; $30/mo free = 60k+ transforms. Fallback to local render-reel if MODAL_KEN_BURNS_URL not set. (2) Mood-based music: lib/mood-music.ts uses Haiku to detect emotion from caption, selects from 7-mood Pexels CC0 library. Music mixed into Ken Burns by Modal worker (loops + fade-out at end). (3) Share to Feed toggle: sendReelSurfaceToggle() UI lets users pick Reels (max reach) vs Feed (grid only). set_surface: webhook action updates pending_posts.surface. (4) Cover frame picker: lib/cover-frame-picker.ts extracts keyframes from video; sendCoverFramePicker() shows 5-frame carousel. pick_frame: handler ready (frame extraction integration pending). Setup: docs/MODAL_KEN_BURNS_SETUP.md. Next: deploy Modal worker, set env var in Vercel, integrate frame extraction.
next_session_ideas: FFmpeg API: Deploy Modal worker & set MODAL_KEN_BURNS_URL in Vercel, test Ken Burns reel generation
FFmpeg API: Integrate cover frame extraction into render flow (extract → upload → show picker UI → store selection)
Music: Swap Pexels URLs for Spotify/SoundCloud API (higher quality, artist credits)
24h post-mortem cron — pull IG insights, send WA digest with top metric + suggestion
URL repurposing — TikTok/IG/tweet link → re-encoded media + rewritten caption
Scheduled cron via Supabase pg_cron + pg_net.http_post (Vercel Hobby workaround)

metadata.latest_pr: PR #42 — Hybrid Video Rendering (FFmpeg Ken Burns, mood music, surface toggle, cover picker)
